tasks.title: Add core API base URL config
tasks.description: Add VITE_CORE_API_BASE_URL to .env.local and .env.example. All API calls must use this base.
acceptance: No hardcoded API URLs in src/
VITE_CORE_API_BASE_URL used in all fetch calls

tasks.title: Add required headers to all API requests
tasks.description: All requests must include Authorization: Bearer <token>, X-Request-Id (UUID v4). POST command endpoints must also include Idempotency-Key.
acceptance: Authorization header present in all requests
Idempotency-Key present on all POST mutations

tasks.title: Audit Supabase direct calls
tasks.description: Enumerate all places that call Supabase directly for business data (bookings, passengers, billing, api-keys, webhooks, audit). List them in API_GAP_REQUESTS.json so VS Code LLM can track which core endpoints need to be delivered.
acceptance: API_GAP_REQUESTS.json populated with all gaps found
